import{gamesData}from'./games';// Функция для получения случайных 15 игр (без повторов)
const getRandomGames=function(count){let excludeIds=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:[];const available=gamesData.filter(g=>!excludeIds.includes(g.id));const shuffled=[...available].sort(()=>0.5-Math.random());return shuffled.slice(0,count);};export const casesData=[{id:1,name:'Шутер-кейс',price_stars:50,image_url:'/images/cases/shooter.png',category:'shooter',genre:'Шутер',games:getRandomGames(15)},{id:2,name:'RPG-кейс',price_stars:80,image_url:'/images/cases/rpg.png',category:'rpg',genre:'RPG',games:getRandomGames(15)},{id:3,name:'Инди-кейс',price_stars:40,image_url:'/images/cases/indie.png',category:'indie',genre:'Инди',games:getRandomGames(15)},{id:4,name:'Стратегии',price_stars:70,image_url:'/images/cases/strategy.png',category:'strategy',genre:'Стратегия',games:getRandomGames(15)},{id:5,name:'Приключения',price_stars:60,image_url:'/images/cases/adventure.png',category:'adventure',genre:'Приключения',games:getRandomGames(15)},{id:6,name:'Симуляторы',price_stars:65,image_url:'/images/cases/simulator.png',category:'simulator',genre:'Симулятор',games:getRandomGames(15)},{id:7,name:'Спорт',price_stars:55,image_url:'/images/cases/sport.png',category:'sport',genre:'Спорт',games:getRandomGames(15)},{id:8,name:'Хоррор',price_stars:75,image_url:'/images/cases/horror.png',category:'horror',genre:'Хоррор',games:getRandomGames(15)},{id:9,name:'Экшен',price_stars:85,image_url:'/images/cases/action.png',category:'shooter',genre:'Экшен',games:getRandomGames(15)},{id:10,name:'Мультиплеер',price_stars:90,image_url:'/images/cases/multi.png',category:'shooter',genre:'Мультиплеер',games:getRandomGames(15)},{id:11,name:'Классика',price_stars:45,image_url:'/images/cases/classic.png',category:'indie',genre:'Классика',games:getRandomGames(15)},{id:12,name:'Инди-хиты',price_stars:50,image_url:'/images/cases/indie_hits.png',category:'indie',genre:'Инди',games:getRandomGames(15)},{id:13,name:'Стратегии
